headline: 3 Large-Cap Stocks with Solid Fundamentals
summary: Large-cap stocks usually command their industries because they have the scale to drive market trends. The flip side though is that their sheer size can limit growth as expanding further becomes an increasingly challenging task.

headline: How Is Zoetis’ Stock Performance Compared to Other Healthcare Stocks?
summary: Zoetis has underperformed its industry peers over the past year, yet Wall Street remains optimistic about the stock.

headline: Jim Cramer Says He Feels 'Something Not Well' At Zoetis, Names A Rival As His Pick
summary: Cramer says Zoetis has issues. Prefers this stock in animal health industry. Energy Transfer is in a good position.
